minimum_requirements.windows: 10 or newer for the documented PowerShell local CLI path

warnings: alpha prerelease manifest; not the stable CLI Local Runtime release
production signature verification is not available in this public manifest
install.ps1 downloads only GitHub Release assets and verifies artifact SHA256 before installing
no PATH mutation is performed unless -SetPath is explicit
production Google login is not included
Google client secrets are not included in the public repo
token exchange is not performed in the public CLI
refresh token plaintext storage is not enabled
account sync is not performed by the public CLI
local private memory is not uploaded automatically
OpenAI shared traffic remains disabled by default
production AWS backend is not included
production Oracle/cloud runtime is not included
self-evolution remains proposal-only and does not mutate code or releases
